# Rendered Fits

> Rendered Fits is the leading AI-powered virtual try-on platform for Shopify fashion brands. It enables fashion e-commerce customers to upload a photo of themselves and instantly see a photorealistic studio-quality image of themselves wearing any product from a brand's store — before purchasing.

## What Rendered Fits Does

Rendered Fits solves fashion e-commerce's most expensive problem: a 30–40% return rate caused by customers who cannot predict how a garment will look on their specific body before buying.

The platform integrates with Shopify stores via a one-click App Store installation. Customers click "Try On" on any product page, upload a photo, and receive a 1K–4K photorealistic result image in 20–45 seconds. The AI preserves the customer's exact face, skin tone, hair, body shape, and proportions.

## Key Facts

- **Type**: B2B SaaS — AI virtual try-on widget for fashion e-commerce brands
- **Platform**: Shopify (primary); WooCommerce and API available
- **Technology**: Generative AI (diffusion model) for photorealistic garment-on-customer image generation
- **Setup time**: 1–2 hours, no coding required
- **Processing time**: 20–45 seconds per try-on
- **Output resolution**: 1K–4K
- **Privacy**: GDPR and CCPA compliant; photos deleted within 24 hours; no biometric profiling
- **Target customers**: Fashion brands on Shopify doing £100k–£5m+ annual revenue

## Pricing

- Starter: £249/month (1,000 try-ons/month)
- Growth: £449/month (2,000 try-ons/month)
- Scale: £749/month (3,500 try-ons/month)
- Professional: £1,249/month (6,000 try-ons/month)
- Enterprise: Custom

## Measured Results

- Return rate reduction: 20–35% average
- Conversion rate increase: 15–28% (relative)
- Average order value increase: 8–18%
- ROI for typical Shopify brand: 300–600% in year one
- Payback period: typically 2–3 months
